mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, status, close_at, settle_due_at, total_pool, initial_virtual_liquidity, created_at, updated_at FROM market WHERE id = #{marketId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, market_id, option_code, option_text, display_order, range_min, range_max, min_inclusive, max_inclusive, virtual_pool_amount, real_pool_amount, total_contract_quantity, current_price, prediction_count, is_result, created_at, updated_at FROM market_option WHERE market_id = #{marketId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_price_history history JOIN market_option ON market_option.id = history.option_id AND market_option.market_id = history.market_id WHERE history.market_id = #{marketId}
AND history.option_id = #{optionId}

SELECT m.id AS market_id, m.title, m.category, m.answer_type, m.status, m.close_at, m.judge_date, m.judge_data_source, m.judge_criteria, m.result_option_id, m.result_value, m.result_text, COALESCE(SUM(p.point_amount), 0.00) AS total_pool_amount, COALESCE(ms.settlement_pool, m.settlement_pool, 0.00) AS settlement_pool_amount, COALESCE(ms.settled_at, m.settled_at) AS settled_at FROM market m LEFT JOIN market_settlement ms ON ms.market_id = m.id LEFT JOIN market_prediction p ON p.market_id = m.id AND p.status = 'SETTLED' WHERE m.id = #{marketId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY m.id, m.title, m.category, m.answer_type, m.status, m.close_at, m.judge_date, m.judge_data_source, m.judge_criteria, m.result_option_id, m.result_value, m.result_text, ms.settlement_pool, m.settlement_pool, ms.settled_at, m.settled_at

SELECT o.id AS option_id, o.option_code, o.option_text AS option_label, o.range_min, o.range_max, o.min_inclusive, o.max_inclusive, COUNT(p.id) AS prediction_count, COUNT(DISTINCT p.member_id) AS participant_count, COALESCE(SUM(p.point_amount), 0.00) AS pool_amount, o.current_price AS final_price, o.total_contract_quantity, o.is_result FROM market_option o LEFT JOIN market_prediction p ON p.market_id = o.market_id AND p.option_id = o.id AND p.status = 'SETTLED' WHERE o.market_id = #{marketId} GROUP BY o.id, o.option_code, o.option_text, o.range_min, o.range_max, o.min_inclusive, o.max_inclusive, o.current_price, o.total_contract_quantity, o.is_result, o.display_order ORDER BY o.display_order ASC, o.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_prediction WHERE market_id = #{marketId} AND status = 'SETTLED'

SELECT p.id AS prediction_id, p.member_id, p.option_id, o.option_code, o.option_text AS option_label, p.point_amount, p.price_snapshot, p.contract_quantity, p.status, CASE WHEN p.option_id = m.result_option_id THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_correct, p.created_at AS participated_at FROM market_prediction p JOIN market_option o ON o.id = p.option_id AND o.market_id = p.market_id JOIN market m ON m.id = p.market_id WHERE p.market_id = #{marketId} AND p.status = 'SETTLED' ORDER BY p.created_at ASC, p.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO market_reputation_update ( market_id, prediction_id, member_id, is_correct, status, attempt_no, last_error_code, last_error_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{marketId}, #{predictionId}, #{memberId}, #{isCorrect}, #{status}, #{attemptNo}, #{lastErrorCode}, #{lastErrorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market_reputation_update WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'UNKNOWN') ORDER BY updated_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE market_reputation_update SET status = 'SUCCESS', attempt_no = attempt_no + 1, last_error_code = NULL, last_error_message = NULL, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE market_reputation_update SET status = 'FAILED', attempt_no = attempt_no + 1, last_error_code = #{errorCode}, last_error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE market_reputation_update SET status = 'UNKNOWN', attempt_no = attempt_no + 1, last_error_code = #{errorCode}, last_error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market ( title, description, category, answer_type, metric_unit, judge_data_source, judge_criteria, judge_date, status, close_at, settle_due_at, total_pool, fee_rate, fee_amount, settlement_pool, initial_virtual_liquidity, price_model, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{answerType}, #{metricUnit}, #{judgeDataSource}, #{judgeCriteria}, #{judgeDate}, #{status}, #{closeAt}, #{settleDueAt}, #{totalPool}, #{feeRate}, #{feeAmount}, #{settlementPool}, #{initialVirtualLiquidity}, #{priceModel}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO market_option ( market_id, option_code, option_text, display_order, range_min, range_max, min_inclusive, max_inclusive, virtual_pool_amount, real_pool_amount, total_contract_quantity, current_price, prediction_count, is_result, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{option.marketId}, #{option.optionCode}, #{option.optionText}, #{option.displayOrder}, #{option.rangeMin}, #{option.rangeMax}, #{option.minInclusive}, #{option.maxInclusive}, #{option.virtualPoolAmount}, #{option.realPoolAmount}, #{option.totalContractQuantity}, #{option.currentPrice}, #{option.predictionCount}, #{option.isResult}, #{option.createdAt}, #{option.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_prediction WHERE market_id = #{marketId} AND status IN ('POINT_PENDING', 'POINT_UNKNOWN')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_prediction WHERE market_id = #{marketId} AND status IN ('POINT_PENDING', 'POINT_UNKNOWN')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_prediction WHERE market_id = #{marketId} AND status = 'CONFIRMED'
SELECT * FROM market_prediction WHERE market_id = #{marketId} AND status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY id ASC FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM market_void WHERE market_id = #{marketId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_void ( market_id, reason_type, reason_detail, refund_status, voided_by, voided_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{marketId}, #{reasonType}, #{reasonDetail}, #{refundStatus}, #{voidedBy}, #{voidedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO market_refund_detail ( market_void_id, prediction_id, member_id, refund_amount, status, idempotency_key, fail_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{detail.marketVoidId}, #{detail.predictionId}, #{detail.memberId}, #{detail.refundAmount}, #{detail.status}, #{detail.idempotencyKey}, #{detail.failReason}, #{detail.createdAt}, #{detail.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market_refund_detail WHERE market_void_id = #{marketVoidId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id ASC FOR UPDATE

SELECT m.id FROM market m JOIN market_void mv ON mv.market_id = m.id JOIN market_refund_detail mrd ON mrd.market_void_id = mv.id WHERE m.status = 'VOIDED' AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND mv.refund_status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND ( mrd.status IN ('FAILED', 'UNKNOWN') OR ( mrd.status = 'PENDING' AND mrd.updated_at <= #{pendingThreshold} ) ) GROUP BY m.id ORDER BY MIN(mv.updated_at) ASC, MIN(m.id) ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_refund_detail WHERE market_void_id = #{marketVoidId} AND status != 'SUCCESS'
mapper.update: UPDATE market_prediction SET status = 'REFUNDED', refund_amount = #{refundAmount}, fail_reason = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{predictionId} AND status IN ('REFUND_PENDING', 'REFUND_UNKNOWN')

UPDATE market SET result_option_id = #{resultOptionId}, result_value = #{resultValue}, result_text = #{resultText}, status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{marketId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market_prediction WHERE id = #{predictionId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_prediction ( market_id, option_id, member_id, point_amount, status, point_spend_idempotency_key, attempt_no, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{marketId}, #{optionId}, #{memberId}, #{pointAmount}, #{status}, #{pointSpendIdempotencyKey}, #{attemptNo}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE market_prediction SET option_id = #{optionId}, point_amount = #{pointAmount}, price_snapshot = NULL, contract_quantity = NULL, expected_payout_per_contract_snapshot = NULL, expected_multiplier_snapshot = NULL, status = 'POINT_PENDING', point_spend_idempotency_key = #{pointSpendIdempotencyKey}, attempt_no = #{attemptNo}, fail_reason = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{predictionId} AND status = 'FAILED'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market WHERE id = #{marketId} AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM market_option WHERE market_id = #{marketId} ORDER BY id ASC FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO market_price_history ( market_id, option_id, prediction_id, price_before, price_after, real_pool_before, real_pool_after, contract_quantity_before, contract_quantity_after, event_type, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{history.marketId}, #{history.optionId}, #{history.predictionId}, #{history.priceBefore}, #{history.priceAfter}, #{history.realPoolBefore}, #{history.realPoolAfter}, #{history.contractQuantityBefore}, #{history.contractQuantityAfter}, #{history.eventType}, #{history.createdAt}, #{history.updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE market_prediction SET price_snapshot = #{priceSnapshot}, contract_quantity = #{contractQuantity}, status = 'CONFIRMED', updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{predictionId} AND status = 'POINT_PENDING'

UPDATE market_prediction SET price_snapshot = #{priceSnapshot}, contract_quantity = #{contractQuantity}, status = 'CONFIRMED', fail_reason = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{predictionId} AND status IN ('POINT_PENDING', 'POINT_UNKNOWN')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market_prediction WHERE market_id = #{marketId} AND status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY id ASC FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_settlement ( market_id, result_option_id, total_pool, fee_rate, fee_amount, settlement_pool, winning_contract_quantity, payout_per_contract, burned_point_amount, status, settled_by, settled_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{marketId}, #{resultOptionId}, #{totalPool}, #{feeRate}, #{feeAmount}, #{settlementPool}, #{winningContractQuantity}, #{payoutPerContract}, #{burnedPointAmount}, #{status}, #{settledBy}, #{settledAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO market_settlement_detail ( settlement_id, prediction_id, member_id, original_point_amount, contract_quantity, payout_per_contract, settled_amount, profit_amount, status, idempotency_key, fail_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{detail.settlementId}, #{detail.predictionId}, #{detail.memberId}, #{detail.originalPointAmount}, #{detail.contractQuantity}, #{detail.payoutPerContract}, #{detail.settledAmount}, #{detail.profitAmount}, #{detail.status}, #{detail.idempotencyKey}, #{detail.failReason}, #{detail.createdAt}, #{detail.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market_settlement_detail WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM market_settlement WHERE market_id = #{marketId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM market_settlement_detail WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} AND status IN ('FAILED', 'UNKNOWN') ORDER BY id ASC FOR UPDATE

SELECT market_settlement.market_id FROM market_settlement JOIN market_settlement_detail ON market_settlement.id = market_settlement_detail.settlement_id JOIN market ON market.id = market_settlement.market_id WHERE market.status = 'SETTLEMENT_IN_PROGRESS' AND market.deleted_at IS NULL AND market_settlement.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND market_settlement_detail.status IN ('FAILED', 'UNKNOWN') GROUP BY market_settlement.market_id ORDER BY MIN(market_settlement.updated_at) ASC, MIN(market_settlement.id) ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_settlement_detail WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} AND status != 'SUCCESS'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_settlement_detail WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} AND status IN ('FAILED', 'UNKNOWN')
mapper.update: UPDATE market SET fee_amount = #{feeAmount}, settlement_pool = #{settlementPool}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{marketId} AND status = 'SETTLEMENT_IN_PROGRESS' AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE market SET status = 'SETTLED', settled_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{marketId} AND status = 'SETTLEMENT_IN_PROGRESS' AND deleted_at IS NULL
